Honky Tonk Grill
home of the recession special-Order from your server or at the bar
Recession Special
Fried bologna sandwich, piled high.
Served with chips, MoonPie & and an ice cold PBR
Cheeseburger
Served with side of chips.
Substitute fries for $3 or onion rings for $4
Chicken Tenders Basket
Served with side of chips.
Substitute fries for $3 or onion rings for $4
Grilled Cheese
*Not served with fries
Cheese Curd Basket
Crispy fried cheese curds. Served with ranch/marinara
Onion Ring Basket
Golden fried onion rings
Sweet Potato Fry Basket
Basket of sweet potato fries
French Fry Basket
Golden, crispy french fry basket
MoonPie
The world famous MoonPie
